items.caption: A circular embroidered patch with a black background. the patch prominently displays the iconic tongue and lips logo of the rolling stones, a well-known rock band. above the logo, the text "the rolling stones" is written in white, and below it, "50 years" is inscribed in a smaller font, indicating the celebration of the band's half-century milestone. the patch is set against a white textured surface, which contrasts with the black background of the patch.
